notes_zh:
- **修复** 更新检查失败时提供 GitHub/Gitee 手动下载链接
- **修复** 切换链接时预览显示错误内容
- **修复** 删除条目后偶发崩溃
- **优化** 全局快捷键无需等待辅助功能授权即可生效
notes_en:
- **Fix** Show GitHub/Gitee download links when update check fails
- **Fix** Link preview showing wrong content when switching URLs
- **Fix** Occasional crash after deleting items
- **Improve** Global hotkey works immediately without accessibility permission
